title: helianthus neomexicanus
intro: Helianthus neomexicanus, also known as New Mexican sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helianthus neomexicanus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a potential remedy for skin conditions and other health concerns. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for topical and internal use, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
